summary: Email Invitation System testing completed successfully. All 12 features verified. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows working correctly. Gmail SMTP email sending is working. Tokens expire in 7 days and are single-use.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - Double response.json() call causing 'body stream already read' error when token is invalid

passed_tests: Workspace invitation sends email to unregistered user ✓
Board invitation sends email to unregistered user ✓
Card invitation sends email to unregistered user ✓
Invitation token validation endpoint returns correct details ✓
Expired invitation tokens are rejected (410 status) ✓
Used invitation tokens are rejected (single-use verified) ✓
Invitation accept page shows correct details for unauthenticated users ✓
Invitation accept page shows Accept button for authenticated users ✓
Accepting invitation adds user to workspace/board/card ✓
Email logs are stored in database ✓
Admin email-logs endpoint returns logs with filtering and pagination ✓
Admin pending-invitations endpoint returns pending invites with expiration status ✓
Email logs endpoint requires admin auth ✓
Pending invitations endpoint requires admin auth ✓
Success message displayed after invitation accepted ✓
User redirected to correct workspace/board after acceptance ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Email service (email_service.py) is well-implemented with SMTP retry logic, branded templates, and proper async handling
Invitation tokens are properly stored in MongoDB with expiration dates and usage tracking
Accept page correctly handles all states: loading, unauthenticated (Login/SignUp), authenticated (Accept), error, and success
Email logs are created on every invitation attempt with success/failure status
seed_data_creation: Multiple test invitations created during testing with emails like test_ws_*, test_board_*, test_card_* @example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email invitation system fully tested. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_email_invitations.py covers all invitation endpoints. SMTP is working with Gmail credentials in backend/.env. All invitation types (workspace, board, card) send emails successfully. Frontend AcceptInvitePage handles all states correctly.

workspace_invitation_email.details: POST /api/workspaces/{id}/members sends email to unregistered users, adds existing users directly

board_invitation_email.details: POST /api/boards/{id}/invite sends email to unregistered users, adds existing users directly

card_invitation_email.details: POST /api/cards/{id}/invite sends email to unregistered users, adds existing users directly

invitation_token_validation.details: GET /api/invitations/{token} returns invitation_type, target_name, invited_by_name, role, email, expires_at

token_expiration_7_days.details: Tokens expire 7 days from creation, expired tokens return 410

single_use_tokens.details: Used tokens return 410, cannot be reused

accept_page_unauthenticated.details: Shows invitation details with Login/Sign Up buttons

accept_page_authenticated.details: Shows Accept Invitation button, user email displayed

accept_invitation.details: POST /api/invitations/{token}/accept adds user to workspace/board/card, returns redirect URL

email_logs_storage.details: Email logs stored with to_email, email_type, success, error, invitation_token, sent_at

admin_email_logs_endpoint.details: GET /api/admin/email-logs supports filtering (success_only) and pagination (limit, skip)

admin_pending_invitations_endpoint.details: GET /api/admin/pending-invitations returns unused tokens with is_expired flag
